prompt: A conference reached out asking one of our R-Ladies to run an R-Ladies branded panel. How do we evaluate it and get it approved?
assertions: Says an R-Ladies branded event needs R-Ladies global-team approval
Says to email info@rladies.org (with the approval template)
Says to check the conference has a Code of Conduct
Says to check the conference's own speaker/role diversity (systematically-excluded groups)
Says invited R-Ladies speakers should have fees waived/reimbursed and travel/lodging/meals covered
Mentions tracking in the rladies_global_presentations repo
